## Goal

What should this improve?

## Proposed Work

What should be built or changed?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The outcome is visible in the demo, report, or README.
- [ ] The implementation is documented enough for a reviewer.
- [ ] Any generated assets are stored intentionally.
